item.title: What a weight loss journey! She looks so much happier now
item.dc:creator: redditsauce

item.title: I stand with JoCat
item.description:
Apparently, this adorably super-inclusive video about liking All The Girls has led to a level of harassment against JoCat resulting in him no longer creating content.
This Dungeons & Discourse video [https://youtu.be/dgIaOXH6hso] was in my recommended today and I was all WTF but really though?
Did a quick search for "miss you jocat" and saw lots, lots more. T_T
JoCat.net has a whole statement on why this is happening, it's sad and it's gross.
This kind of behavior from people on the internet towards people who create content on the internet is inhumane, and I respect JoCat's decision. That said, it's exhausting to see over and over again, it's exhausting to read/listen to vitriol from Know It All Trolls who get all Wiser Than Thou in the comments and then decide to take their nonsense into Meatspace with doxxing and packages and jfc ffs.
Even making this post is basically like WHY SHOULD I BOTHER foreseeing the potential for backlash from people I don't know because I support a human who made something cute and WE CAN'T EVEN HAVE CUTE THINGS FROM NICE PEOPLE ANYMORE OR SUPPORT EACH OTHER IN LOSING CUTE THINGS AND CUTE PEOPLE ANYMORE. But I'm posting anyway because Imgur is full of good people and it feels like the last place on the internet that understands why this feels awful. So fuck it, here's some vulnerability. FP EDIT: I love you people. Give to the @TheFreePizzaDude fund (I can't right now) or, like, save some money for yourself so you can live decently, or send me positive mental health stuff because I can always use it. And keep being good to each other.
item.dc:creator: moopdrive

item.title: Images of Note: A Magical Lady
item.description:
I would most certainly steamboat a Willie.
The more unhinged the pair the better. Give me Compo from Last of the Summer Wine with Hozier.
aaaaaaaaaaa
Stop calling me out.
OK, which one is the "Me" and "I" in this picture, because it's potentially every single character in this picture.

item.title: The 377th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - "SOUND ON! Videos A.F." Edition # 31
item.description:
owo
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
Sorry about the cropping
Sorry about the cropping
Sorry about the cropping
WHY IS THE TORT EVEN THERE?!
Ope, no sound on these two
Skills
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #SoundOn #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple

item.title: Some SST love for Sci-Fi!
item.dc:creator: evaunit117

item.title: Space Colony Artwork from NASA's Ames Research Center, 1970s
item.description:
Three space colony summer studies were conducted at NASA Ames in the 1970s. A number of artistic renderings of the concepts were made. There were three different types of colonies rendered; -Toroidal colonies (population of 10,000) -Bernal spheres (population of 10,000) -Cylindrical colonies (population of 1,000,000)
Cutaway view, exposing the interior.
Exterior view.
Construction along the torus rim.
Model of torus colony.
Exterior view.
Interior including human powered flight.
Cutaway view of Bernal Sphere.
Agricultural modules in cutaway view (multiple toroids).
Construction crew at work on the colony.
Model of a Bernal Sphere.
Exterior view of a double cylinder colony.
Interior view looking out through large windows.
Endcap view with suspension bridge.
Eclipse of the sun with view of clouds and vegetation.
Multiple two-cylinder colonies aimed toward the sun. Thanks for stopping by! Loving all the sci fi stuff today. Art work by Don Davis and Rick Guidice. Sources: -https://nss.org/settlement/nasa/70sArtHiRes/70sArt/art.html -https://www.nasa.gov/image-article/retrofuturistic-nasa-space-art/

item.title: DARK BRANDON STRIKES AGAIN! $35 Insulin Price Cap Goes Into Effect For Most Patients
item.description: More Americans with diabetes will get a break on their insulin costs in 2024. Sanofi is joining the nation’s two other major insulin manufacturers in offering either price caps or savings programs that lower the cost of the drugs to $35 for many patients. The three drugmakers are also drastically lowering the list prices for their products. The moves were announced in the spring, but some didn’t take effect until January 1. Congress and new players in the market have increased pressure on insulin manufacturers to lower their prices. Medicare enrollees now pay no more than $35 a month for each of their insulin prescriptions, thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act, which Democratic lawmakers pushed through Congress in 2022. But drugmakers also faced changes to the Medicaid rebate program that would have likely cost them hundreds of millions of dollars each if they didn’t lower their list prices. https://www.cnn.com/2024/01/01/politics/insulin-price-cap/index.html #DarkBrandonStrikesAgain

item.title: I deleted my calorie counting app. Wish me luck
item.description: So, I am going to try to eat 3 meals a day, veg, fruit, and try to re-learn my hunger cues. If I gain a bit of weight, so be it at this point. My bmi is 20, from 27 last year. I have a very bad diet lately because all I have been focusing on is calories. It sounds strange, I know, but for some reason calorie counting gives me tendencies to minimize even healthy foods for the sake of calories. This sounds weird….but I was often eating sweets instead of actual food. It worked for weight loss, horrible for everything else. Today I made myself the breakfast in the photo. It was daunting, but I feel good after eating actual food as opposed to just iced coffee for breakfast like I have been. I also threw away my vape. I am going to start cooking again. I am going to minimize foods that override your hunger cues like ultra processed sweets, and watch what I eat . This doesn’t mean I won’t ever eat treats but I’m not going to be living on food without protein or vitamins. Oddly enough when I am calorie counting I live on processed foods because they are easier to count for a lazy person. I am going to focus on sensible portions of actual food and prepare them in standard ways. Last year, I went through a period of stress that resulted in unintentional weight loss, that resulted in me calorie counting, that then resulted in me developing habits that were borderline disordered. I’m not going to say how many calories I was actually eating but it was way too low, resulted in rapid weight loss for someone who wasn’t actually even technically overweight by the time I started calorie counting, and yeah…..it got weird. Pro life tip. If someone loses 30 lb/14 kg in three months and isn’t very obese, that is a red flag. Please do not rush them with compliments on their weight loss, especially if they aren’t talking about it. I wish people wouldn’t comment on weight loss unless the person brings it up. This experience honestly has opened my eyes to how weird people are about weight and how I essentially brainwashed myself into believing what I was doing was healthy even though my hair was literally falling out and my skin was flaking. I was posting before and afters being so delusional that I thought I was being healthy because I was losing weight, even though rationally that wasn’t the case. Also, additionally, I was getting an over abundance of encouragement to continue to lose more and more weight while in a healthy weight range by people in my life, because a lot of women here are very small and the local standard is a very thin, short woman. I will never be shorter, but being thinner pushed me closer to the standard. Wish me luck. I will be posting pictures of home cooked meals again soon. But thought I’d share. Edit: I have lost more than enough weight, I’m not really looking for weight loss advice. My waist to height ratio indicates I’m underweight, even though my bmi is normal. I am trying to rebuild my relationship with food and if I lose or gain some weight from that I don’t know, but I’ll accept it as it is. Obviously if either case is excessive I’ll evaluate as needed, but I am looking to maintain my weight in a healthier way. Also, I still am planning on being aware of calories, but I am not counting every single gram of garlic I am putting in my pasta sauce. I’m eating mindfully, and not mindlessly eating. For me personally, calorie counting apps foster this behavior, but I am not saying that is the case for everyone. Some people do well with these apps, but for me, having an app congratulate me for eating an amount that’s way too low for my height and activity level isn’t great for my mental health.
item.dc:creator: personalrandomgirlaccount

item.title: Japan Airlines A350 bursts into flames after it hit a Dash8 on the Runway in Tokyo Haneda Airport
item.description:
All 379 people aboard the A350 managed to evacuate the plane before flames engulfed it.
Unfortunately, 5 passengers out of 6 in the Dash8 were killed. It was a Coast Guard Crew.
extensive damage to the nose of the a350.
item.dc:creator: gobnaitOLunacy

item.title: It's a start...
item.description: Used to be the only way I'd get to sleep. Still had some wine but that was mostly to try and trick my brain into the trigger of "There's alcohol in the blood, bed time." To anyone else attempting to pull yourself out of the bottle, let's do this day by day. Celebrate small steps because they are just as important as the big ones.
item.dc:creator: RandyRandalman
